results.title: QTS expands Atlanta-Metro data center
results.raw_content: QTS Atlanta-Metro is a hyperscale data center in Atlanta, Georgia operated by QTS Realty Trust. The facility provides 72 MW of IT load and uses chilled-water air cooling with a design PUE of 1.3. The campus spans 990,000 square feet and is fully operational. Power is supplied by Georgia Power with N+1 redundancy and diesel backup generators.

results.title: Inside the QTS Atlanta campus
results.raw_content: The QTS Atlanta-Metro site was originally a Sun Microsystems chip plant. It has been operational for over a decade and serves wholesale colocation customers.
